description: Case style: Analog watch with a round stainless steel case for enhanced durability Dial style: Black dial with a fixed bezel and white hands Strap style: Black strap with a tang clasp for comfort and style Features: Branding on the 12 and 6 hour mark on the dial Screw to reset time Water resistance up to 50 meters, allowing you to wear it out while swimming but not poolside diving, snorkelling or water Sports Warranty: 2 years (1 year for digital and ana-digital watches)
